contract.no_execution_change: This map does not place trades, change credentials, or bypass runtime checks.
contract.purpose: Map current live and historical coverage of the planetary financial ecosystem.
contract.source_of_truth: runtime status, live stream cache, exchange monitoring checklist, and global history database.

cash_aware_call_plan.operator_note: No meaningful cash/position detected, so use more budget for streams, quotes, and candidate discovery.

sources.next_action: Keep Binance live cache fresh and feed high-volume crypto candidates.

official_notes: Binance limits are weight-based, not simple call counts; endpoints with multiple symbols can cost more.
The runtime should read exchangeInfo and response headers when available, then back off on Retry-After.
Use streams for live market data so REST weight remains available for account, order, and recovery calls.
official_rate_limit.title: Binance Spot REST/WebSocket

sources.title: Binance live crypto universe

cash_aware_call_plan.operator_note: No meaningful cash/position detected, so use more budget for streams, quotes, and candidate discovery.

sources.next_action: Activate Kraken live cache, fee context, collateral context, and order-book probes.

official_notes: Kraken private history calls are expensive: Ledgers, TradesHistory, and ClosedOrders add +4 to the counter.
AddOrder/CancelOrder do not use the private-account counter, but they use Kraken's separate trading limit model.
Keep private account-history sync low priority; favor WebSocket/public market streams for live discovery.
official_rate_limit.title: Kraken Spot REST/WebSocket

sources.title: Kraken spot and margin live crypto

cash_aware_call_plan.operator_note: No meaningful cash/position detected, so use more budget for streams, quotes, and candidate discovery.

sources.next_action: Enable fresh stock/ETF snapshots and market-hours state.

official_notes: Alpaca's official market-data docs define plan-specific historical limits and WebSocket subscription limits.
Alpaca support documents the Trading API default as 200 requests per minute per account.
Use one stream connection per endpoint in most plans; use REST history budget for backfill, not live ticks.
official_rate_limit.title: Alpaca Trading and Market Data

sources.title: Alpaca equities, ETFs, and crypto snapshots

cash_aware_call_plan.operator_note: No meaningful cash/position detected, so use more budget for streams, quotes, and candidate discovery.

sources.next_action: Enable fresh Capital market snapshots and profitable-position close telemetry.

official_notes: Capital supports REST and WebSocket real-time prices for platform instruments.
Order/position requests must respect the endpoint limits and still need confirmation checks.
Use WebSocket subscriptions for up to 40 active instruments and keep session refresh separate from market scans.
official_rate_limit.title: Capital.com REST/WebSocket
